problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction may resolve What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
